name: Source of Pipeline
description: Where pipeline comes from — marketing, sales, partner, expansion, other — under a governed source taxonomy. Replaces the ad-hoc reporting where every team's number disagrees with every other team's.
alsoSurfaces: How is our pipeline mix split across marketing, sales, partner, and expansion?
How has the mix shifted over the last 12 weeks?
Which source category has the highest win rate and largest deals?
Where do we suspect double-counting between marketing and sales?
beforeWeRun: Time window — trailing 12 weeks, or custom?
Granularity — weekly, monthly, or quarterly buckets?
Which source categories to display — all five, or a custom subset?

whatYoullGet.name: Headline mix
whatYoullGet.desc: Donut chart of current-period mix with category percentages.

whatYoullGet.name: Mix over time
whatYoullGet.desc: Stacked area chart showing mix evolution across the time window.

whatYoullGet.name: Per-category trends
whatYoullGet.desc: Small-multiple line charts — one per category — with shared scale.

whatYoullGet.name: Conversion quality
whatYoullGet.desc: Sortable table with pipeline value, count, win rate, avg deal size, and time-to-close per category.

whatYoullGet.name: Trend signals
whatYoullGet.desc: Card list highlighting categories with sustained mix shifts and their magnitude.

callout: 3 quick inputs, then Sage builds your source-of-pipeline dashboard in ~9 min.
